{"code":"(def in-progress-issues (linear__list_issues {:state "in_progress"}))
(def grouped-by-assignee (group-by :assignee in-progress-issues))
(def counts (map (fn [[assignee issues]] [assignee (count issues)]) grouped-by-assignee))
(def max-assignee (apply max-key second counts))
max-assignee"}
